description_long: This is a cylindrical duffel-style handbag made from dark brown leather with a slightly distressed finish, giving it a rugged and vintage appearance. The bag features a long, adjustable shoulder strap attached with metal clasps, as well as a short handle on top for hand carrying. There are two vertical leather straps running down the sides, secured with buckles at the base, and a horizontal strap on one end for easy gripping. A zipper runs along the top length of the bag, providing access to the main compartment, and a small external zippered pocket is visible on one side. The hardware, including buckles and clasps, appears to be metallic, adding a subtle accent to the overall design. The bag is unadorned by decorative elements or logos, emphasizing its utilitarian and classic style.
description: A cylindrical, dark brown leather duffel handbag with a long adjustable strap, top handle, and metallic hardware. It features a main zipper closure and a small external zippered pocket.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the circular side, the long shoulder strap, and a horizontal grip strap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bag, the top handle, vertical leather straps with buckles, and the draped shoulder strap.
description_view_2: Opposite end view highlighting the circular side, the horizontal grip strap, and the zipper running along the top.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the external zippered pocket, top handle, and vertical leather straps with buckles.
attribute_strap_type: One long adjustable shoulder strap with metal clasps, one short top handle, and a horizontal grip strap on the end.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main zipper closure running along the top length of the bag; small external zippered pocket on one side.
